name: Torn Cloth
primaryUsage: Starter light armor, wraps, and low-tier utility crafts.
source: Common drop from early humanoids, scavengers, and abandoned road camps.
notes: Base cloth material for early crafting and broad recipe compatibility.

name: Cracked Leather
primaryUsage: Starter skirmisher armor, straps, and flexible armor parts.
source: Common drop from wolves, road hounds, and raider skirmishers.
notes: Primary early leather base shared by beast and raider crafting themes.

name: Bent Iron Scrap
primaryUsage: Basic weapons, shield trims, and reinforced early armor.
source: Common drop from guards, raiders, and broken roadside caches.
notes: Core early metal base that anchors the first weapon and armor recipes.

name: Wolf Fang
primaryUsage: Bleed weapons, beast talismans, and agile Blackfang recipes.
source: Uncommon drop from Blackfang wolves, stalkers, and marsh beasts.
notes: Early faction material that introduces beast-themed and bleed-oriented crafting.

name: Raider Emblem
primaryUsage: Rage gear, raider weapons, and aggressive frontier recipes.
source: Uncommon drop from Wild Raiders, Blood Raiders, and camp lieutenants.
notes: Frontier faction token used to signal the first real specialization jump.

name: Blackfang Pelt
primaryUsage: Rare skirmisher armor, bleed cloaks, and advanced beast crafts.
source: Rare drop from Blackfang Alpha variants and deeper forest predators.
notes: Rare Blackfang trophy that bridges early beast crafting into midgame gear.

name: Iron Rivets
primaryUsage: Tier-step metal for medium armor, shields, and reinforced gear.
source: Common drop from salvaged raider armor, watchtower defenders, guard patrols, and fortress stores.
notes: First clear progression-gating metal used to separate early scrap crafts from structured armor without blocking level 6 recipes.

name: Chain Links
primaryUsage: Mail foundations, fighter armor, and durable mid-tier crafts.
source: Common drop from shield veterans, mercenary armor sets, and old fort stores.
notes: Structured tier material that marks the shift into true midgame armor crafting.

name: Guard Insignia
primaryUsage: Block gear, poise gear, and disciplined legion-themed recipes.
source: Uncommon drop from Iron Legion guards, veterans, and bastion patrols.
notes: Faction token that anchors the early defender and fortress crafting path.

name: Ash Resin
primaryUsage: Bleed resistance gear, charms, and marsh-alchemy crafts.
source: Uncommon drop from Ashen Marsh cultists, marsh caches, and ritual growths.
notes: Ash-zone faction material that introduces swamp and ritual crafting identity.

name: Blood Ash
primaryUsage: Rare bleed talismans, ritual upgrades, and higher-rarity ash crafts.
source: Rare drop from blood priests, cult elites, and sanctuary ritual nodes.
notes: Early rare catalyst for ritual and bleed-focused crafting branches.

name: Mercenary Mark
primaryUsage: Balanced weapons, duelist accessories, and contract-themed crafts.
source: Uncommon drop from mercenary swordsmen, duelists, and veteran sellblades.
notes: Faction token for the balanced midgame equipment path.

name: Tempered Iron Bar
primaryUsage: Mid-progression weapons, armor frames, and reinforced utility crafts.
source: Common drop from mercenary caches, bastion forges, and refined metal enemies.
notes: Main midgame tier metal that prevents early drops from covering level 15 crafts.

name: Executioner's Hook
primaryUsage: Execute gear, heavy weapons, and elite executioner-themed crafts.
source: Rare drop from executioners, headsmen, and brutal field officers.
notes: Elite trophy material used to signal dangerous execution-field crafting themes.

name: Raven Feather
primaryUsage: Crit gear, skirmisher accessories, and Raven Hollow recipes.
source: Uncommon drop from Raven Hollow predators and advanced Blackfang hunters.
notes: Faction material for the crit-oriented late-midgame skirmisher branch.

name: Legion Steel Plate
primaryUsage: High-tier heavy armor, tower shields, and fortress plate recipes.
source: Uncommon drop from legion protectors, inner bastion elites, and iron vault caches.
notes: Heavy progression-gating plate for the late defender and vanguard recipe band.

name: Ash Sigil Fragment
primaryUsage: Sanctuary crafts, key progression, and advanced ash ritual recipes.
source: Rare drop from ash zealots, sanctuary elites, and end-arc ritual progress.
notes: Late ritual progression material that doubles as a boss and key-crafting bridge.

name: Arena Medal
primaryUsage: Counter gear, arena contracts, and duelist-themed high-tier crafts.
source: Rare drop from arena duelists, champion echoes, and warbound caches.
notes: Late faction token for duelist and counterplay equipment paths.

name: Crimson Ore
primaryUsage: Late heavy weapons, high-tier armor, and endgame forge crafts.
source: Uncommon drop from quarry brutes, deep ore veins, and late-game mining encounters.
notes: Primary late-game tier ore that gates the last major equipment jump before the finale.

name: Vaelor Ash Core
primaryUsage: Epic recipes, final boss crafts, and end-arc signature equipment.
source: Epic drop from Ash Lord Vaelor and the final ash-citadel arc.
notes: Top-end boss material reserved for late signature crafting paths.

name: Fine Leather Thread
primaryUsage: Legacy refined armor component kept for existing recipes and saved inventories.
source: Legacy material retained for compatibility with older crafted equipment paths.
notes: Preserved as a valid material rather than auto-converted in this phase.

name: Polished Weapon Grip
primaryUsage: Legacy weapon component kept live for old save and recipe compatibility.
source: Legacy material retained as a safe bridge for existing weapon recipes.
notes: Remains valid and resolved without forced migration in Phase 2A.

name: Rage-Etched Shard
primaryUsage: Rare catalyst for aggressive, rage-based, and affix-heavy crafts.
source: Rare drop from level 15+ elites, raider champions, and high-risk encounters.
notes: General late-midgame catalyst that supports future rarity scaling without overuse.

name: Staggered Bone Plate
primaryUsage: Rare catalyst for poise, stagger, and brute-themed defensive crafts.
source: Rare drop from brute elites, quarry breakers, and heavy defender encounters.
notes: Late defensive catalyst reserved for heavy-impact and stagger-resistant equipment themes.
